localModifications.description: Added a workflow step that checks the lavish-axi dashboard for open sessions before creating a new artifact (see CHANGELOG.md).

Replaced all npx -y lavish-axi invocations with direct lavish-axi calls, since lavish-axi is installed globally on this machine. Removes the npm-registry network dependency needed by the sandboxed auto-mode setup (see sandbox_automode_plan.md).

lavish.warning: computedHash reflects the original upstream sync and is known to no longer match this file on disk. Do not overwrite this file from upstream without reviewing localModifications first.
